data.name: Monster Ops 10
data.detailed_description:
NSFW Gay Visual Novel Dating Sim!

Play Episode 1 Free on Steam!

Black Ops soldiers Wraith and Tide know they must count on each other to survive. Will their bond as battle-brothers evolve into something more? Monster Ops: Military Special Forces Hunting Rogue Monsters!

This is an open-ended series with no ending planned. It's like a TV show that will continue until it's canceled.

The truth behind Major Denise Hanson's schemes have finally be revealed, and it's so terrible it breaks her mind-controlled slave, Commander Jackson!

Wraith and Tide are inching closer to the truth through the help of Tide's best friend from West Point, Namar Singh.  He's cracked the encrypted files on Hanson and tells them how she arrived in the military and why she made Brigadier General Heath Tide desperate to make an enhanced super-soldier army.

Namar knows Hanson is evil, and as Heath Tide's top aid, he's not happy Heath has decided to work with her.  He swore to protect the general from himself, since he's been self-destructive in the past.  He'll keep that oath no matter what the cost!

An on-going visual novel series with new 1 to 2 hour stand-alone game episodes coming out monthly in 2025!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1ghz
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: High Sierra 10.13 or Higher, Both Intel and Silicon
  • 處理器: 1ghz
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64+
  • 處理器: 1ghz
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
